# Junban

> Local-first task manager with a React/Tauri UI, Hono API, SQLite and Markdown storage,
> AI chat and voice support, MCP integration, and a plugin system.

## Docs

- `docs/README.md`: canonical documentation index and routing entrypoint
- `AGENTS.md`: fast repository navigation for coding agents and maintainers
- `CLAUDE.md`: development guide, architecture summary, and repo conventions
- `docs/guides/`: contributor and maintainer guides (setup, architecture, performance, security, releases)
- `docs/reference/`: technical reference library (frontend, backend, plugins)
- `docs/product/`: product documentation home, mission, roadmap, status

## Reference families

- `docs/reference/README.md`: technical reference library entrypoint
- `docs/reference/frontend/`: UI, views, context, hooks, themes, shortcuts, and API layer docs
- `docs/reference/backend/`: core, database, storage, parser, AI, voice, MCP, CLI, utils, and plugin runtime docs
- `docs/reference/plugins/`: plugin author API and examples

## Product and planning families

- `docs/product/README.md`: product-doc index for mission, roadmap, status, and PRD-style planning
- `docs/product/mission-and-principles.md`: product mission, principles, and long-term direction
- `docs/product/roadmap.md`: product roadmap
- `docs/product/status.md`: current product status snapshot
- `docs/product/prds/README.md`: PRD catalog and lightweight planning docs

## Historical / compatibility references

- `docs/planning/ROADMAP.md`: compatibility path for older roadmap links
